description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and archive. In the build stage add a build_project job that runs `xcodebuild clean -project ProjectName.xcodeproj -scheme SchemeName | xcpretty` then `xcodebuild test -project ProjectName.xcodeproj -scheme SchemeName -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 8,OS=11.3' | xcpretty -s`. In the archive stage add an archive_project job that runs `xcodebuild clean archive -archivePath build/ProjectName -scheme SchemeName` and `xcodebuild -exportArchive -exportFormat ipa -archivePath "build/ProjectName.xcarchive" -exportPath "build/ProjectName.ipa" -exportProvisioningProfile "ProvisioningProfileName"`, stores `build/ProjectName.ipa` as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch. Apply the tags ios_11-3, xcode_9-3, and macos_10-13 to both jobs.
